title: Spyglass Zoom (Updated)
description: Lets you zoom with the spyglass by using the scrollwheel.
body:
# Spyglass Zoom

![Demonstration](https://i.imgur.com/4mlWC03.gif "Mod in Action")

This mod enhances the spyglass by allowing you to zoom in or out using the scrollwheel.

## Updated
This is a fork of the [Spyglass Zoom mod by cobrasrock](https://modrinth.com/mod/spyzoom), updating it to latest versions of Minecraft.
